artifacts.summary: Deep analysis of blocker root cause, W vs D architecture, and 5 options compared. Recommends Option C: separated W/D architecture using TimelineQuot (has LinearOrder via IsTotal) for D and CanonicalMCS for W with on-demand witness saturation.

next_steps: Run /plan 988 to create implementation plan v3 based on Option C (separated W/D architecture)

key_findings: CanonicalMCS preorder lacks IsTotal - cannot give LinearOrder via Antisymmetrization
TimelineQuot already has IsTotal proven via denseTimeline_linearly_ordered
Cantor isomorphism TimelineQuot ≃o Rat already proven in codebase
W (world states) and D (durations) must be architecturally separated
TimelineQuotFMCS has forward_G/backward_H but missing forward_F/backward_P
On-demand witness saturation pattern can bridge the gap
Option C (separated W/D) aligns with existing parametric infrastructure
